title: Draft Ace Agent Foundry organization post
summary: Create a LinkedIn post draft about the user's Ace Agent Foundry operating model: one Codex/workflow foundry repo that organizes multiple app and workflow projects, keeps task state visible, and helps concurrent workflows combine without losing context.
acceptance_criteria: the post draft uses the user's rough spoken framing as primary voice source material
the next phase grills for target audience, personalness level, intended angle, and which projects or task-state examples should be cited
the draft distinguishes personal reflection from source-backed claims about the foundry repo, projects, tasks, and workflow state
the draft explains why a single Agent Foundry/control-plane view matters when multiple app or workflow builds are happening at once
the draft avoids unsupported claims about automation capabilities unless verified from loaded project state
the final draft remains draft-only and requires explicit user approval before any external publishing action
any durable draft artifact is written only after a matching phase guard approval

context_snapshot.summary: Load the LinkedIn Posts project state, the active post-generation workflow task, and this intake task before planning or drafting the Ace Agent Foundry organization post.

session_log.event: Created intake task after the user invoked native Codex planning for a new post about organizing apps, workflow projects, and task state through Ace Agent Foundry.
Moved task into previous workflow planning after the user asked to start creating the post.

next_action: Create or confirm the native Codex plan, then implement it.
